# LMN3

> Strategic product development and advisory consulting for startups and product-led companies, led by Iva Rumora.

## Services

- [Product Development](/product-development): Build, scale, and refine digital products from MVP to enterprise — roadmaps, prioritization frameworks, and agile delivery.
- [Strategic Advisory](/strategic-advisory): Define value proposition, market positioning, and go-to-market strategy for product teams and founders.
- [Product Marketing & GTM](/product-marketing-gtm): Launch and position products with the right messaging, competitive differentiation, and sales enablement.

## Company

- [About Us](/about-us): Meet Iva Rumora — product partner, founder, and 9+ year veteran of product leadership — and learn the LMN3 methodology.
- [Blog](https://irumora.substack.com): Product strategy, go-to-market playbooks, and frameworks for founders and product leaders.

## Case Studies

- [Product Development](/product-development#client-showcase): Real engagements across AI developer tools and B2B traveltech.
- [Strategic Advisory](/strategic-advisory#client-showcase): Advisory outcomes for B2B SaaS, proptech, and marketplace verticals.
- [Product Marketing & GTM](/product-marketing-gtm#client-showcase): Launch, positioning, and growth marketing results.

## Resources

- [Startup Health Diagnostic](/startup-health): An interactive body-analogy diagnostic that maps SaaS unit economics (MRR, NRR, CAC, LTV, churn) to vital signs.
- [Contact](/contact): Book a discovery call or send an inquiry for product development, advisory, or go-to-market support.
